name: se-review-skills-bounded-inventory-output
title: Bound se-review-skills inventory output
description: Review snapshot 230ef6a407b002089a70addee2f3d1eaa0e6df1bf5a65e89fd15f4450d0e7255; finding 1.7.9.1. Add a safe bounded-output preservation path for the se-review-skills analyzer so full repository and installed-copy inventories remain complete and parseable without overflowing ordinary tool transport. Preserve snapshot identity and read-only review behavior. Affected paths: templates/skills/se-review-skills/SKILL.md, templates/skills/se-review-skills/scripts/skill_review.py, and tests/test_skill_review.py.
creator: sdelmas
